products.name: Ashwi Mandir Compact (4ft)
products.description: A compact modern mandir designed for apartments and smaller prayer corners. Features an illuminated OM panel, integrated shelves, and enclosed storage for puja essentials.

products.name: Ashwi Mandir Grand (5ft)
products.description: A statement prayer unit for larger interiors, combining traditional detailing with a modern silhouette. Includes decorative backlighting, practical storage cabinets, and premium finishing.

products.name: Ashwi Mandir White LED Edition
products.description: An elegant white-finish home mandir with built-in LED lighting and carved OM detailing. Designed to create a peaceful ambiance while keeping puja items neatly organized.

products.name: Hollywood Style Dressing Table Set
products.description: Premium vanity set with mirror-frame lighting for clear, shadow-free makeup visibility. Comes with five spacious drawers, a large mirror setup, and a matching cushioned stool.

products.name: Designer TV Unit Collection
products.description: A curated range of contemporary TV unit styles featuring ambient lighting, closed and open storage, and glass-front display sections to enhance modern living spaces.

products.name: Optimized Wardrobe 5ft x 6.5ft (Model A)
products.description: Smartly partitioned wardrobe with hanging sections, shelves, and drawers for efficient organization. Includes a dedicated churi hanger and thoughtful internal layout.

products.name: Optimized Wardrobe 5ft x 6.5ft (Model B)
products.description: A second finish option of our 5ft x 6.5ft optimized wardrobe. Built for high-capacity storage with durable construction, smooth access drawers, and hanging provisions.

products.name: Glass Door Utility Cabinet
products.description: A practical utility cabinet with glass-front upper doors and enclosed lower storage. Designed for organized everyday use in living areas, offices, or multi-purpose rooms.

products.name: Bubble Sofa

products.description: A designer sofa from the Butterfly collection featuring sculpted contours and a refined profile. Built to deliver premium comfort with standout visual appeal.

products.name: Butterfly Sofa 3.0
products.description: The premium Butterfly 3.0 model combines a graceful silhouette with supportive cushioning. A high-impact piece for luxurious and design-forward living rooms.
